LanguageData.DP_CurseOfImpermenance.label: Impermenance
LanguageData.DP_CurseOfImpermenance.description: The user is invisible to most observers, but their ability to interact within this world is greatly limited. (note: since you don't have Royalty DLC, it just makes the user really hard to damage).
LanguageData.DP_CurseOfImpermenance_REQRoyalty.label: Impermenance
LanguageData.DP_CurseOfImpermenance_REQRoyalty.descri: The user is invisible to most observers, but their ability to interact within this world is greatly limited.
LanguageData.DP_GhostType.label: Ghost Type
LanguageData.DP_GhostType.description: This pawn is a ghost type; They can walk through walls in dungeons but get hungry much quicker.
LanguageData.DP_GlitchedTeleportation.label: Glitched Reality
LanguageData.DP_GlitchedTeleportation.description: This pawn's position and momentum is unstable. They may randomly teleport to a random nearby location, but their positional instability reduces the effect of attacks against them.
LanguageData.DP_LostMercy.label: Lost Mercy
LanguageData.DP_LostMercy.description: This pawn has become aware of many more things.
LanguageData.DP_NinjaEffect.label: Way of Shadows
LanguageData.DP_NinjaEffect_REQRoyalty.label: Way of Shadows
